steps.title: Identify the inputs and outputs
steps.content: The function gives the value of the CD in dollars, and $x$ is the number of years after the investment was made.

steps.title: Interpret the function value
steps.content: The notation $f(2)$ means the value of the CD when $x=2$. Since $x$ measures years after the investment, the statement describes the CD value $2$ years after the investment.

steps.title: Choose the matching statement
steps.content: The statement says the total value after $2$ years is approximately $8{,}652.80$ dollars, not the interest rate, a number of days, or the gain over the initial value. The answer is C.
